message:
fix(node): infinite loop in mmr_proofs sync_from_stream + duplicate version in category_shift

mmr_proofs: push_bounded eviction caused sync_from_stream while-loop to
never terminate when stream_size > MAX_LEAF_HASHES. Fix: skip to last
MAX_LEAF_HASHES entries directly instead of iterating from current len.

category_shift: version derived from self.history.len() produced duplicates
after push_bounded eviction. Fix: monotonic next_report_version counter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
